title: Did the Fed drive the tech selloff?
section_path: Did the Fed drive the tech selloff?
section_path_text: Did the Fed drive the tech selloff?
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week. A slightly more hawkish-than-anticipated first appearance of the new Fed Chair, Kevin Warsh, has investors worried that the world's most important central bank will increase rates and reduce the size of its balance sheet. Mr Warsh's comments were followed by an intensifying selloff, focused on AI-related stocks.
